name: Diagnostic Notebook Deployment
description: Deploy the diagnostic check notebook (NB05) that validates data quality, table existence, and pipeline health across all 3 Lakehouses in the Medallion Architecture.

tasks.name: Resolve Lakehouse IDs
tasks.description: Look up BronzeLH, SilverLH, and GoldLH Lakehouse IDs from workspace items via Fabric REST API.

tasks.name: Read Notebook Source
tasks.description: Read 05_DiagnosticCheck.py source file from the notebooks/ folder in the project repository.

tasks.name: Inject Lakehouse Metadata
tasks.description: Inject META dependencies block into notebook source with GoldLH as default Lakehouse and all 3 lakehouses (BronzeLH, SilverLH, GoldLH) as known dependencies.

tasks.name: Deploy Diagnostic Notebook
tasks.description: Create or reuse HorizonBooks_05_DiagnosticCheck notebook item and upload Base64-encoded definition via POST /items/{id}/updateDefinition.
